description: Detects when the Fear & Greed Index and X/Twitter crowd sentiment are pointing in OPPOSITE directions — the highest-value signal in macro trading. When Fear & Greed says FEAR but the crowd is BULLISH (or vice versa), a divergence trade setup exists. Octodamus quantifies the gap, names the trade direction, and flags whether it aligns with the AI oracle signal. One call, one edge.
what_it_delivers: JSON: { asset, fear_greed_score, fear_greed_label, crowd_sentiment, divergence_detected: bool, divergence_magnitude: "low|medium|high", trade_direction: "BUY|SELL|HOLD", oracle_confirms: bool, reasoning: string, timestamp }. This is Ben's deployed sentiment-divergence service logic, wrapped for ACP agent consumption.
